findings.evidence: `JDiff` and `JDiff_self_eq` are already the underlying general API at `code/TauCeti/KnotTheory/Grid/JFunction.lean:249` and `:290`; `maslovO`/`maslovX` are exactly `GridPoint.JDiff x.pointSet G.OSet x.pointSet G.OSet + 1` and the X analogue at `code/TauCeti/KnotTheory/Grid/Gradings.lean:45` and `:62`, while the new proofs repeat the same pattern at `GradingInteger.lean:87` and `:101`.
findings.fix: First add a general integer formula and cast theorem in `GridPoint`, e.g. `JDiffSelfℤ (s a) := (I s s : ℤ) - JNum s a + I a a` and `JDiff_self_eq_intCast : JDiff s a s a = (JDiffSelfℤ s a : ℚ)`, then define/prove the O and X Maslov results by specializing it and adding `1`.
findings.issue: `maslovOℤ`/`maslovXℤ` and their cast proofs duplicate the same special case of the general self-pairing `GridPoint.JDiff s a s a`.

summary: The Maslov integrality statements are proved only for the two marking specializations even though the existing API exposes the general `JDiff s a s a` self-pairing they instantiate.
